ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patents" (
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patent */,
  "pf_no" INTEGER /* Patent file number */,
  "p_no" TEXT /* Patent application number */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the patent */,
  "earnings" INTEGER /* Earnings generated by the patent */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the patent (e.g., Filed, Published, Granted) */,
  "p_year" INTEGER /* Year the patent was published */,
  "a_month" INTEGER /* Month the patent was published */,
  "date_entry" TEXT /* Date the patent was entered into the system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the patent */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date the patent was filed */,
  "grant_date" TEXT /* Date the patent was granted */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the patent will expire */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the patent was filed */,
  "legal_status" TEXT /* Legal status of the patent (e.g., active, expired, abandoned) */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of patent application (e.g., utility, design, plant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patents_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patents_p_year FOREIGN KEY ("p_year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patents_a_month FOREIGN KEY ("a_month") REFERENCES months ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventors" (
  "inventor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the inventor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inventor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the inventor (e.g., researcher, professor) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the inventor is affiliated with */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the inventor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the inventor */,
  "research_area" TEXT /* Primary research area of the inventor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_inventors" (
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent */,
  "inventor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patent_id", "inventor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year the patent was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" INTEGER /* Month the patent was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "earnings" (
  "earning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earning */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of earning */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the earning was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the earnings (e.g., licensing, royalties) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the earnings are recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("earning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the patent */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the patent was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
